## Running Summary

### LMJ Rice Retailing POS System

- **Project Name:** LMJ Rice Retailing POS
- **Backend:** Python (Flask), SQLite
- **Frontend:** HTML/CSS, Jinja2 templates
- **Modules:** Supplier, Inventory, Customer, Sales
- **Features:**
	- Calendar-based sales log
	- Daily sales page with 12-hour time formatting
	- Centered navigation buttons
	- Supplier, inventory, and sales management
	- Report module removed as requested
- **Status:** Fully functional, ready for use
- **Recent Fixes:**
	- Added custom Jinja2 filter for 12-hour time formatting
	- Fixed daily sales page display
	- UI improvements and bugfixes
